title: Insights into the Latest Immigration News | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Immigration insights
BAL’s immigration experts provide insights on the latest changes and most common challenges in employment-based immigration.
Get in-depth analysis on how to navigate a rapidly changing immigration environment with articles, infographics and guides written by BAL’s legal experts.

### Visit BAL at SHRM26 in Orlando!
Stop by BAL’s booth to connect with our immigration experts and discover how we help organizations power human achievement through strategic workforce mobility.

### See where BAL is going next
Check out all our upcoming events to see where you can find BAL’s immigration experts next.

## Frequently asked questions
Find answers to some of the most asked immigration questions, including how to prepare for H-1B cap season, how to read the monthly Visa Bulletin and how to ensure Form I-9 compliance.

## US immigration policy tracker
Trying to keep up with the latest immigration changes and announcements? Bookmark our policy tracker for the latest executive orders, memoranda and proclamations from the Trump administration.

## USCIS fee calculator
Calculate estimated immigration filing fees with our easy-to-use tool.

## Actionable intelligence for immigration professionals
Members receive exclusive access to benchmarking, events and networking.

## See how BAL can help with your immigration needs.
